details: Burns rice - pot too thin - documented complaints
Breaks after 2-3 months - multiple failure reports

Coating damage < 1 year - buttons stop working after 2.5 years
2.5/5 Trustpilot rating - durability problems despite TÜV cert
Teflon/Sumiflon inner pot - not ceramic - very expensive
120V/60Hz models incompatible - need specific 220V EU versions
